name: Python
description: High-level, interpreted programming language known for readability and versatility.
key_features: Dynamic typing with optional type hints

common_patterns.async: Use asyncio for I/O-bound concurrent code
common_patterns.dataclasses: Use dataclasses for simple data containers

common_pitfalls.example_bad: funcs = [lambda: i for i in range(3)]
common_pitfalls.example_good: funcs = [lambda i=i: i for i in range(3)]

common_pitfalls.solution: Restructure code or use import inside function

performance_tips: Use list comprehensions over explicit loops
Consider using slots for memory-heavy classes
Use appropriate data structures (set for membership, dict for lookup)
